typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	ArchiveUpdates as string (),
	FileName as string (),
	NewWeekLCM as integer (),
	Owner as string (),
	PrevWeekRC as integer (),
	sArchiveUpdates as string (),
	sFileLCMNew as string (),
	TimeStamp as string ()
}

source(output(
		Ramservername as string,
		Cio as string,
		Ciodirect as string,
		Managedbygroup as string,
		Primaryapplication as string,
		Cistatus as string,
		Rtstatus as string,
		Rtplannedactivity as string,
		Fundingdate as string,
		Rtdecomdate as string,
		Rtplancertifieddate as string,
		Hweoldate as string,
		Applicationids as string,
		Normalizedos as string,
		{Eol Hw Thru 2023} as string,
		{Hds Thru 2022} as string,
		Cioname as string,
		Ciodirectname as string,
		{Vm On Hds2022 Esx Depthru 2023} as string,
		Productname as string,
		Primarytechmgr as string,
		Environment as string,
		{Hds Thru 2023} as string,
		{Hds Thru 2024} as string,
		Lcmstatus as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false) ~> RawLCMNEw
RawLCMNEw derive(Import_date = toString(currentDate())) ~> Importdate
Importdate sink(input(
		Applicationids as string,
		Cioname as string,
		Eol_Hw_Thru_2023 as string,
		Rtdecomdate as string,
		Primarytechmgr as string,
		Ramservername as string,
		Cistatus as string,
		Lcmstatus as string,
		Normalizedos as string,
		Rtstatus as string,
		Productname as string,
		Hds_Thru_2023 as string,
		Primaryapplication as string,
		Hds_Thru_2022 as string,
		Import_date as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		Rtplannedactivity as string,
		Cio as string,
		Ciodirectname as string,
		Hds_Thru_2024 as string,
		Hweoldate as string,
		Ciodirect as string,
		Rtplancertifieddate as string,
		Environment as string,
		Vm_On_Hds2022_Esx_Depthru_2023 as string,
		Managedbygroup as string,
		Fundingdate as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		Applicationids,
		Cioname,
		Eol_Hw_Thru_2023 = {Eol Hw Thru 2023},
		Rtdecomdate,
		Primarytechmgr,
		Ramservername,
		Cistatus,
		Lcmstatus,
		Normalizedos,
		Rtstatus,
		Productname,
		Hds_Thru_2023 = {Hds Thru 2023},
		Primaryapplication,
		Hds_Thru_2022 = {Hds Thru 2022},
		Import_date,
		Rtplannedactivity,
		Cio,
		Ciodirectname,
		Hds_Thru_2024 = {Hds Thru 2024},
		Hweoldate,
		Ciodirect,
		Rtplancertifieddate,
		Environment,
		Vm_On_Hds2022_Esx_Depthru_2023 = {Vm On Hds2022 Esx Depthru 2023},
		Managedbygroup,
		Fundingdate)) ~> tblLCMNewWeekTracking
